patches.find: anchored to Magellanic Cloud geometric parallax
patches.replace: anchored to Milky Way Cepheid Gaia parallaxes and the LMC distance from detached eclipsing binaries (Pietrzynski et al. 2019)
patches.rationale: WIN-055 c4 hole 1: LMC distance comes from detached eclipsing binaries (Pietrzynski 2013/2019), not geometric parallax. Parallax was technically wrong — a dome defender could use this to discredit the paragraph. Adds DOI:10.1038/s41586-019-0999-4 citation.

patches.replace: Leavitt 1912, discovered in SMC; modern calibration anchored to the LMC detached-eclipsing-binary distance and Milky Way Cepheid Gaia parallaxes
patches.rationale: WIN-055 c4 hole 4 (minor): Leavitt 1912 paper used SMC not LMC, and calibration is via eclipsing binaries + Gaia, not LMC parallax. Consistent with hole 1 fix.
